data.title: Why Did Skillsoft (SKIL) Stock Surge After Hours?
data.description: Skillsoft Corp (NYSE: SKIL) experienced a significant 26.98% jump in its share price during after-hours trading, reaching $5.60, following the release of its fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company outperformed market expectations, with earnings per share surpassing estimates by 10.53% and revenue exceeding predictions by 0.39% for the period ending Jan. 31. In comparison to the same quarter the previous fiscal year, Skillsoft reported the following figures for Q4 Fiscal 2026: Total Revenue of $131 million (down from $134 million in Q4 Fiscal 2025), Adjusted EBITDA of $31.17 million (up from $29.93 million), and Free Cash Flow of $27 million (compared to $13 million). The company achieved an earnings per share of $1.26, surpassing the estimated $1.14 by 10.5%, while revenue also topped forecasts by 0.4%. Talent Development Solutions, Skillsoft's primary unit for enterprise digital learning, contributed $103 million in revenue during the fourth quarter. Ron Hovsepian, Skillsoft's Executive Chair... data.title: GTN appoints former E*TRADE, BUX and Capital.com executive Salim Sebbata as Chief Commercial Officer for Europe
data.description: Bringing more than three decades of experience in the fintech and financial services sectors, Salim Sebbata has been appointed to lead GTN's commercial expansion in the fast-growing investment market of Europe. The announcement was made by GTN, a global fintech company focused on enabling unrestricted investment opportunities. The development was disclosed on April 8, 2026, in London.

data.title: Coinbase to expand into stock trading in Australia after receiving license, subject to local financial regulations.
data.description: Coinbase has now been subject to Australia's financial regulations as the nation establishes supervision of crypto exchanges.

data.title: Anthropic restricts AI model access due to cyberattack fears. AI matches/exceeds human experts in finding software flaws.
data.description: Anthropic reported that artificial intelligence models have achieved a coding capability that matches or surpasses that of the majority of human experts in discovering and exploiting software vulnerabilities.

data.title: 4M BTC moved to long-term wallets as network activity enters 'bull phase' signal.
data.description: The amount of Bitcoin in wallets held by long-term investors has exceeded 4 million BTC, as a network activity indicator indicated a positive trend signaling a "bull phase."

data.title: Global Guava Puree Market Outlook 2026-2036: Clean-Label Beverage Innovation and Tropical Sourcing Expansion Drive 5.7% CAGR Growth
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, a report by Future Market Insights, Inc. reveals that the global market for guava puree is experiencing steady growth due to a rise in demand among food and beverage producers for natural, functional, and clean-label ingredients. The market is currently valued at approximately USD 517.30 million.

data.title: APL Logistics Opens Amsterdam Distribution and Fulfilment Centre
data.description: In Amsterdam on April 8, 2026, APL Logistics, part of the Kintetsu World Express (KWE) Group, inaugurated a new warehouse for distribution and fulfilment at the Port of Amsterdam. This infrastructure marks the expanding operations of APL Logistics.

data.title: Cashbook Announces New Addition to Sales Team in North America
data.description: Cashbook is pleased to announce the addition of Craig Bolton as the Senior Solution Consultant for North America. Based in Limerick, Ireland, Craig brings over 25 years of finance industry experience to the North American Team. His appointment will further solidify Cashbook's footprint in North America, enhancing the company's operations and client services in the region.

data.title: CHANDON unveils a new ready-to-serve Spritz collection
data.description: Chandon, established in 1959, continues to innovate with its latest introduction of Chandon Terroirs. The renowned brand is known for producing premium sparkling wines across various vineyards worldwide. With a presence in countries such as Argentina, California, Brazil, Australia, and China, Chandon has been a pioneer in showcasing different terroirs through its diverse range of wines. This latest expression exemplifies Chandon's commitment to exploring new flavors and styles across its global vineyard network.
